memoryArtifacts.headline: Aleid
memoryArtifacts.description:
Huwelijk met Willem
Over Aleid van Gelre is weinig bekend uit contemporaine bronnen. Haar geboortejaar is onbekend en over haar jeugd aan het Gelderse hof is niets overgeleverd. In de Annalen van Egmo …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Adelaide of Guelders (c.?1182-1218)
memoryArtifacts.description: Adelaide of Guelders (c.?1182-1218) was the daughter of Count Otto I of Guelders and his wife, Richardis, the daughter of Duke Otto I of Bavaria and Agnes of Loon. Also known as Adelaide of Bellich or …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelheid von Geldern於大約1180年出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德時，她的父親Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen31歲，母親Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern17歲。她於1197年與Willem I van Holland在荷蘭福利曼德斯塔福倫結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1218年2月12日在荷蘭-拉藍德享年39歲，埋葬在荷蘭霍蘭利斯包格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelheid von Geldern于大约1180年出生在荷兰蓋爾德藍德时，她的父亲Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen31岁，母亲Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern17岁。她于1197年与Willem I van Holland在荷兰福利曼德斯塔福倫结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1218年2月12日在荷兰-拉藍德享年39岁，埋葬在荷兰霍蘭利斯包格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Geldern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northern England usually a variant of Geldard, an occupational name from Middle English gelde ‘sterile, barren’, used as a noun to denote ‘gelded cattle’, + Old English hierde, hence ‘herdman who tends the gelded cattle’.
English: alternatively, perhaps an occupational name from Middle English gelder(e) ‘gelder, castrator (of livestock)’.

variants.name: Gilder
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): occupational name for a goldsmith or gilder, from Middle English gilder, gelder, guldar, a derivative of Old English gyldan ‘to gild’.

nameMeanings.name: Adelheid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelheid von Geldern was born about 1180, in Zutphen, Gelderland, Netherlands, her father, Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen, was 31 and her mother, Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, was 17. She married Willem I van Holland in 1197, in Staveren, Friesland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 12 February 1218, in South Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 39, and was buried in Rijnsburg, Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelheid von Geldern est née environ 1180, à Zutphen, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, son père, Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Willem I van Holland en 1197, à Staveren, Frise, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 février 1218, à Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Rijnsburg, Holland, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelheid von Geldern um 1180 in Zutphen, Geldern, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen 31 und ihre Mutter Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern 17. Sie hat 1197 in Staveren, Friesland, Niederlande Willem I van Holland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Februar 1218 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Südholland, Niederlande und wurde in Rijnsburg, Holland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Geldern è nata il circa 1180 nel Zutphen, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Willem I van Holland nel 1197, nel Staveren, Friesland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 febbraio 1218, nel Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Rijnsburg, Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Geldernが約1180年にオランダジェルダーランドズトフンで生まれた時，父Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphenは31歳，母Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayernは17歳であった。1197年にオランダフリースランドスタバーンでWillem I van Hollandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1218年2月12日にオランダズイド-hオランドで39歳で死去し，オランダホーランドリジンスブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Geldern(이)가 대략 1180년 네덜란드 글델랜드 주트프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1197년 네덜란드 프리슬랜드 스타버에서 Willem I van Holland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1218년 2월 12일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 홀랜드 리j스버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Geldern nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Zutphen, Gheldria, Países Baixos, seu pai, Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Willem I van Holland em 1197, em Staveren, Frísia, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1218, em Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Rijnsburg, Holland, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelheid von Geldern родилась около 1180 г. в местности зутфен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Willem I van Holland в 1197 г. в местности ставирен, фриесланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 февраля 1218 г. в местности зуид-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности риджнсбург, холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelheid von Geldern nació aproximadamente 1180, en Zutphen, Gelderland, Países Bajos, su papá, Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Willem I van Holland en 1197, en Staveren, Frisia, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de febrero de 1218, en Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Rijnsburg, Holland, Países Bajos.
